inputs.label: Original Price per Item
inputs.businessContext: The regular unit selling price of the item before any promotion.

businessContext_i18n.en: The regular unit selling price of the item before any promotion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir promosyon öncesi ürünün normal birim satış fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der reguläre Verkaufspreis pro Einheit vor jeglicher Aktion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente unitaire habituel de l'article avant toute promotion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta unitario habitual del artículo antes de cualquier promoción.

inputs.label: Buy Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of items the customer must purchase to qualify for the free items (the 'Buy' part).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items the customer must purchase to qualify for the free items (the 'Buy' part).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterinin ücretsiz ürünleri almaya hak kazanması için satın alması gereken ürün sayısı ('Al' kısmı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Artikel, die der Kunde kaufen muss, um die kostenlosen Artikel zu erhalten (der 'Kauf'-Teil).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles que le client doit acheter pour bénéficier des articles gratuits (la partie 'Achetez').
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de artículos que el cliente debe comprar para calificar para los artículos gratis (la parte 'Comprar').

inputs.label: Get Quantity (Free)
inputs.businessContext: Number of items the customer receives for free (the 'Get' part).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items the customer receives for free (the 'Get' part).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterinin ücretsiz aldığı ürün sayısı ('Ver' kısmı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Artikel, die der Kunde kostenlos erhält (der 'Erhalten'-Teil).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles que le client reçoit gratuitement (la partie 'Obtenez').
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de artículos que el cliente recibe gratis (la parte 'Recibir').

inputs.label: Number of Sets
inputs.businessContext: How many times the BOGO deal is applied (e.g., buy 2 get 1 free repeated twice).

businessContext_i18n.en: How many times the BOGO deal is applied (e.g., buy 2 get 1 free repeated twice).
businessContext_i18n.tr: BOGO anlaşmasının kaç kez uygulandığı (örneğin, 2 al 1 bedava iki kez tekrarlanırsa).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie oft das BOGO-Angebot angewendet wird (z. B. 'Kaufe 2, erhalte 1 gratis' zweimal wiederholt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Combien de fois l'offre BOGO est appliquée (ex. : achetez 2 obtenez 1 gratuit répété deux fois).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuántas veces se aplica la oferta BOGO (ej., compre 2 y llévese 1 gratis repetido dos veces).

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable tax percentage on the purchase. Set to 0 if tax is not considered.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable tax percentage on the purchase. Set to 0 if tax is not considered.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alışverişe uygulanan vergi yüzdesi. Vergi dikkate alınmıyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Steuerprozentsatz auf den Kauf. Auf 0 setzen, wenn Steuer nicht berücksichtigt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe applicable sur l'achat. Mettre 0 si la taxe n'est pas prise en compte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto aplicable a la compra. Establezca 0 si no se considera impuesto.

inputs.label: Additional Discount
inputs.businessContext: Any extra percentage discount applied to the total (e.g., store-wide sale).

businessContext_i18n.en: Any extra percentage discount applied to the total (e.g., store-wide sale).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam tutara uygulanan herhangi bir ek yüzde indirim (örneğin, mağaza genelinde indirim).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher prozentualer Rabatt auf die Gesamtsumme (z. B. Filialverkauf).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout pourcentage de remise supplémentaire appliqué au total (ex. : vente à l'échelle du magasin).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier descuento porcentual extra aplicado al total (ej., oferta en toda la tienda).

formulas.costPerItem: (originalPrice * buyQuantity * numberOfSets * (1 - additionalDiscount / 100) * (1 + taxRate / 100)) / ((buyQuantity + getQuantity) * numberOfSets)
formulas.totalSavings: originalPrice * (buyQuantity + getQuantity) * numberOfSets - originalPrice * buyQuantity * numberOfSets * (1 - additionalDiscount / 100) * (1 + taxRate / 100)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
